rows.name: USMCA / CUSMA / T-MEC
rows.notes: Trilateral. Replaces NAFTA. Origin claim via Certification of Origin.

rows.name: EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement
rows.notes: Zero-tariff if UK or EU origin and proven via statement on origin.

rows.name: CPTPP (Comprehensive and Progressive Trans-Pacific Partnership)
rows.notes: 12 parties. UK acceded December 2024. Staged tariff elimination — most lines at 0% by 2026 for original parties.

rows.name: EU-Japan Economic Partnership Agreement
rows.notes: ~99% of trade duty-free at full implementation. Apparel, leather, footwear free from entry into force.

rows.name: UK-Japan Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement
rows.notes: Replicates EU-Japan EPA. Free trade on most industrial goods; agriculture subject to TRQs.

rows.name: Korea-US Free Trade Agreement (KORUS)
rows.notes: Fully phased in — nearly all goods at 0%. Origin claim via self-certification.

rows.name: EU-Korea Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: Industrial goods duty-free; phased elimination on agriculture mostly complete.

rows.name: EU-Canada Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA)
rows.notes: 98% of tariff lines duty-free. Origin via exporter statement on commercial invoice.

rows.name: UK-Australia Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: Post-Brexit bilateral. Tariffs eliminated on entry into force for most industrial goods.

rows.name: UK-New Zealand Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: Tariffs eliminated on entry into force for most goods.

rows.name: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership
rows.notes: ASEAN+5. Phased tariff reductions over 20 years. Most industrial goods at 0% by 2026 for major parties.

rows.name: African Continental Free Trade Area
rows.notes: 54 AU member states. Trading under preferences since 2021; tariff offers + rules of origin schedules being progressively published. Eritrea not party.

rows.name: European Free Trade Association
rows.notes: Free movement of industrial goods + processed agriculture between members. EFTA also has 30+ third-country FTAs (see efta-* entries).

rows.name: EFTA-Singapore FTA
rows.notes: Industrial goods duty-free.

rows.name: EFTA-Hong Kong FTA
rows.notes: Industrial goods duty-free; fish + agriculture limited.

rows.name: EU-Vietnam Free Trade Agreement (EVFTA)
rows.notes: Phased elimination of 99% of tariffs over 7-10 years. Apparel + footwear duty-free from entry into force for most lines.

rows.name: EU-Singapore Free Trade Agreement (EUSFTA)
rows.notes: All tariffs eliminated by 2024 (5-year phase-in from EIF).

rows.name: EU-New Zealand FTA
rows.notes: All EU import duties on NZ industrial + ~91% of agriculture eliminated from EIF.

rows.name: EU-Mexico Global Agreement (Modernised)
rows.notes: Modernised in 2024; replaces 2000 agreement. Pending ratification in some EU member states.

rows.name: EU-Mercosur Partnership Agreement
rows.notes: Signed December 2024; provisional application from late 2025 pending ratification. 91% of tariffs eliminated at full implementation.

rows.name: EU-Chile Advanced Framework Agreement
rows.notes: Modernises 2003 agreement. ~99.9% of EU exports to Chile duty-free.

rows.name: EU-Ukraine Deep and Comprehensive FTA
rows.notes: DCFTA portion of the EU-Ukraine Association Agreement. Most tariffs eliminated; EU-side autonomous trade measures extended through 2025.

rows.name: EU-Moldova DCFTA
rows.notes: Most tariffs eliminated.

rows.name: EU-Georgia DCFTA
rows.notes: Most tariffs eliminated.

rows.name: EU-Turkey Customs Union
rows.notes: Customs union covering industrial goods + processed agriculture. Agriculture + services not included.

rows.name: UK accession to CPTPP
rows.notes: UK acceded December 2024. Tariff schedules per party — most industrial at 0%.

rows.name: UK-Korea Trade Agreement (continuity)
rows.notes: Continuity of EU-Korea FTA terms; bilateral upgrade in negotiation 2024-2026.

rows.name: UK-Switzerland Trade Agreement (continuity)
rows.notes: Continuity of EU-Switzerland bilateral terms; modernisation underway 2025-2026.

rows.name: UK-Singapore Digital Economy Agreement
rows.notes: Digital trade overlay to the goods-FTA. Goods covered by UK-Singapore FTA (continuity).

rows.name: UK-India Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement
rows.notes: Signed July 2025; phased tariff reductions over 10 years on most lines. Whisky + textiles primary wins.

rows.name: Gulf Cooperation Council Customs Union
rows.notes: Common external tariff (5% on most goods); free movement of GCC-origin goods within union.

rows.name: Eurasian Economic Union
rows.notes: Common external tariff. Sanctions distortions (Russia 2022+) limit practical e-commerce use to non-sanctioned categories.

rows.name: Pacific Alliance
rows.notes: 92% of goods duty-free between members; phased elimination of remainder by 2030.

rows.name: ASEAN Free Trade Area (AFTA)
rows.notes: Common Effective Preferential Tariff: ~99% of intra-ASEAN trade at 0% for ASEAN-6, phased for CLMV.

rows.name: ASEAN-China FTA
rows.notes: Upgrade 3.0 signed 2024. Most goods duty-free.

rows.name: ASEAN-Korea FTA
rows.notes: Most goods duty-free; sensitive lists vary by party.

rows.name: ASEAN-India FTA
rows.notes: Review of goods agreement underway. ~75% of intra-FTA lines at 0%; exclusions list per party.

rows.name: ASEAN-Japan Comprehensive Economic Partnership
rows.notes: Most industrial goods duty-free; phased for agriculture.

rows.name: Australia-United States Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: Most goods duty-free at entry into force.

rows.name: United States-Singapore Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: All originating goods duty-free.

rows.name: United States-Israel Free Trade Agreement
rows.notes: US's first FTA; all originating goods duty-free.

rows.name: Australia-New Zealand Closer Economic Relations Trade Agreement (ANZCERTA)
rows.notes: Full trans-Tasman free trade across goods + services.

rows.name: Japan-Australia Economic Partnership Agreement
rows.notes: Most industrial duty-free; agricultural TRQs separate.
